variants.engine: Lycoming O-145-A1 (See Item 309A for optional engines)
variants.control_surfaces:
Elevator           34°        Up          29°   Down
Aileron            18°        Up          18°   Down
Rudder             30°        Left        30°   Right
Stabilizer         2.5°       Up           4°   Down
variants.serial_numbers:
2325, 2327, 2339, 2340, 2342, 2344, 2345, 2347, 2349, 2351, 2355 and up, 2356-A,
2357-A and up, and 8277-1 through 8277-40.

Required Equipment            In addition to the pertinent required basic equipment specified in CAR 4a, the following
items of equipment must be installed:
Landplane: Items 101, 102, 103, and 104.
Seaplane:       Items 103, 104 and 151.
